programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Meher's long and magical hair entertains and fascinates her entire school. Meanwhile, Daittya Pari and Tauba Tauba work on their next move to bring chaos into the world.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Meher starts to get frustrated with her hair and its abilities. As she expresses her agony, Daittya Rani decides to visit her and threatens to make her disappear forever. Can Baalveer save her?

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Daittya Rani decides to abduct Meher and cut her hair. Meanwhile, the fairies start to panic as they realise Daittya Pari is back and seeking revenge.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena is eager to celebrate with the colony as they return from Pune with their award. But, they are not sure how to approach Popatlal as he may still be upset about his cancelled wedding.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: In order to connect with each other and share a few laughs, the women of Gokuldham colony organise and attend a kitty party.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tries to hurry up home after Babita prepares a Bengali cuisine for him. Later, he gets angry when Champaklal interrupts his and Babita's conversation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal gets upset after Goli eats the entire dish prepared by Babita; Jethalal discusses the declining sales with Nattu Kaka and Bagha.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha and Nattu Kakka offer free pani puri on purchases from Gada Electronics; the society's sweeper demands a higher salary.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal, although hesitant, agrees with Bagha and Nattu Kakka's plan to increase sales. On the other hand, people hear about the offer and get excited.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The society members prepare themselves to celebrate and welcome Ganesh Chaturthi.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is confident that the panipuri scheme will be successful; Jethalal informs Bapuji that Nattu Kaka and Bagga had planned a surprise for him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gada Electronics makes amazing profits due to the free unlimited pani puri scheme. However, when the vendor has to go away because of some emergency, Jethalal finds himself in trouble.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Jethalal has no option, he disguises himself as the pani puri vendor and starts selling it himself. He later feels embarrassed when people start recognising him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Jethalal is making and selling the pani puris himself, Iyer and Babita pass by and see him. He gets embarrassed and tries to hide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Jethalal is selling pani puris, the police come and arrest him for putting a stall without permission.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone from the society goes to the police station to bail Jethalal after he is arrested for selling pani puris without permission.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Jethalal is arrested, everyone from the society tries to bail him out. Chalu Pandey reluctantly listens to Jethalal's side of the story and later realises that he is innocent.

programme.title: Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Police discover 'gold woman' Durga Sawant's body in a jungle. Later, investigation reveals she had recently separated from her husband.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: A man is shocked to see his friend's dead body replaced by another man's body. Soon, he calls upon the CID team for help, but he himself becomes the culprit.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When the men of Gokuldham are forced to write poetry for their wives, they ask Taarak for help. However, Taarak refuses to help them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As per their wives' request, the men of Gokuldham society try their best to write poetry for them. Later, Popatlal brags about his poetry.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak decides to teach the men of Gokuldham society about writing poetry. Later, the ladies decide to organise a competition.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men of Gokuldham society think they cannot complete writing the poetry before the competition. Later, the winter party begins.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The winter party celebration begins with the men narrating their poetry. Later, Dr Hathi's poetry impresses everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Despite Jethalal's wish, Iyer successfully presents his poetry for Babita and impresses everyone. Later, Popatlal takes the stage.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Ganesh Acharya comes to Gokuldham society to promote his film 'Hey Bro'. Daya notices the similarities between Dr Haathi and Ganesh Acharya and tells everyone they are related.

programme.title: Yashomati Maiyya Ke Nandlala
programme.desc: Lord Vishnu stops Poorna from mentioning his truth in front of Yashoda. Meanwhile, Lord Shani decides to meet Neel Mani at Gokul.

programme.desc: Mithun Chakraborty shakes a leg with Shilpa Shetty on 'I Am A Disco Dancer' and entertains the audience. Later, Aadhyayasree manages to impress the judges with a dazzling performance.

programme.title: The Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: Comedian Kapil Sharma interacts with celebrity guests about their latest films while keeping the audience laughing with his wit, humour and assorted skits.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Heartbroken by Dhruv's sudden demise, Dr Dev loses control while driving and risks his life. Dr Vaani intervenes at the last second to pull him back from the brink of a terrible accident.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: On being released from prison, Iyer, Bhide and Taarak Mehta are advised to withdraw the case against the goons by their wives. However, not all of them agree to do so.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Popatlal decides to call off the strike against the goon, Lokhande, it upsets Champaklal to no end. Later, Lokhande confronts the men of Gokuldham about their movement against him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal gets suspicious about Tapu's intentions. Next day, Tapu and his gang announce that they are going on a hunger strike for the cricket kit. Jethalal is sure only Champaklal can convince Tapu.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A frantic Daya and Jethalal ask Champaklal to stop the kids from going on a hunger strike. They are shocked when Champaklal refuses to oblige and instead asks them to find a way on their own.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Though the parents try different bribes, the children are still adamant about their hunger strike. However, everyone soon becomes worried when Tapu Sena faints.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu falling unconscious leaves everyone in the society on edge. Soon, things get chaotic when the media arrives to cover the strike.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Alok, a seasoned skydiver, fails to open his parachute on time and falls to his death. Later, the investigations reveal that he was shot from behind.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Team CID is urgently called to a housing society regarding something terrible in the building. Soon, the team enters the apartment and are shocked to see a woman covered in blood, holding a crowbar.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: The CID team arrives at an apartment where a murder has occurred. However, the group is shocked when neighbours claim that the victim was killed by a woman in a painting.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Rishi and Sonali are madly in love with each other, but they elope when their parents disapprove of their relationship. Later, a group of goons chases them in order to kill them.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Team CID investigate the death of a woman named Kavita and they find a letter. Later, Daya starts behaving strangely as he seems to be unable to recognise his colleagues.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Ghanshyam, a criminal, is mysteriously murdered. Soon, Abhijeet lands in big trouble when his gun is revealed to be the murder weapon.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Manhar Manmoji walks to Jethalal's shop and claims that it is his. He even sells a product to a customer, much to Nattu Kaka and Bagha's confusion.

programme.desc: Jethalal complains to Inspector Pandey about Manhar invading his shop; Rajkumar Singhania visits Jethalal's store but gets forced to leave by Manhar Manmoji.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The whole colony celebrates as Popatlal wins a prestigious government award. Simultaneously, Taarak's boss learns of paranormal activity at his bungalow from a guest.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak requests leave from his boss, who defers a decision. But, the boss is hesitant to approve the leave due to unusual occurrences in his haunted house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak receives an invitation to his boss's home, but not merely for a simple visit. So, his boss asks his help in investigating the strange occurrences happening at his house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony is thrilled about a three-day picnic at Taarak's boss' bungalow. But will it be all fun and games, or will something spooky turn the trip upside down?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena looks forward to the picnic as the rest of Gokuldham packs their bags. Will this getaway bring new memories for everyone?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members pack their bags and embark on their bungalow picnic with fervor. But, they are unaware of the twists that await them on their road trip.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members finally reach the bungalow, looking forward to three days of relaxation. However, their getaway might turn spooky, just as Taarak's boss suspected.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.desc: As the colony members enjoy their time at the bungalow, Chakori waits patiently for night to fall. Will she end up spooking everyone once darkness sets in?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal cannot believe his luck as Popatlal loses his ring. In the aftermath of the loss, Popatlal's fortunes take a turn for the worse.

programme.desc: Jethalal finally caves in and decides to wear the ring. Soon, he begins to experience a radical change in fortunes.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
